nasb.text: Then Daniel went to his house and informed his friends, Hananiah, Mishael and Azariah, about the matter,

esv.text: Then Daniel went to his house and made the matter known to Hananiah, Mishael, and Azariah, his companions,

cnv.text: 但以理回到自己的家裡，把這事告訴他的同伴哈拿尼雅、米沙利和亞撒利雅，

ccb.text: 然后，他回到居所将这事告诉同伴哈拿尼雅、米沙利和亚撒利雅，
